overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character exploring an ancient stone temple complex. The character walks through an overgrown graveyard with obelisks and tombstones, then ascends a grand staircase to a massive temple entrance adorned with red banners. The environment features detailed medieval stone architecture and atmospheric overcast lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard entrance with cobblestone path

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone path beside the temple, turning right to enter the graveyard area

entered.detail: large stone temple with tall columns and curved facade
wide stone staircase leading up to temple side entrance
tall stone obelisks and tombstones in grassy area
low stone wall marking graveyard boundary

segments.scene_description: The character begins at the bottom of a side staircase next to a massive stone temple, then turns right onto a cobblestone path. The path runs alongside the temple wall with a graveyard containing stone obelisks visible to the right, enclosed by a perimeter wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown cemetery path between temple and outer wall

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow graveyard path lined with ancient tombstones and obelisks

entered.detail: domed stone structure with rounded roof in the distance
ruined stone arches and columns in the background

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds deeper into the graveyard along a narrow dirt path flanked by the temple wall on the right and a stone wall on the left. The path winds between dense clusters of gravestones and obelisks, with a domed mausoleum and broken archways becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple forecourt with circular cobblestone plaza

events.description: exits the narrow graveyard path into the open temple plaza

agents.ego_description: approaching the main temple entrance across the open cobblestone plaza

entered.detail: grand staircase leading to the main temple entrance
tall red banners hanging on either side of the temple door

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow cemetery path, the scene opens into a wide cobblestone plaza facing the temple's main facade. The grand staircase and entrance come into view, flanked by prominent red banners. The domed mausoleum recedes into the background as the character approaches the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase ascending to temple entrance

events.description: begins ascending the steep stone staircase toward the entrance
reaches the top of the stairs and stops before the temple door

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep stone stairs toward the large wooden temple door, then stopping at the entrance

entered.detail: large ornate wooden door with metal studs and geometric patterns
intricate stone carvings and tall arched windows on the temple front

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the steep stone staircase toward the temple entrance. As the climb progresses, the red banners grow larger on either side, and the detailed wooden door with its ornate metalwork becomes the focal point. The character reaches the top step and stops before the massive entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded outskirts of a stone temple through a dense graveyard and toward a grand ceremonial entrance. It begins at the base of a side staircase, turning right onto a cobblestone path that runs alongside the temple wall and a perimeter-enclosed graveyard of stone obelisks. As the camera proceeds deeper, the path narrows into a dirt trail winding between clusters of gravestones and broken archways, with a domed mausoleum appearing in the distance. The scene then opens from the cramped cemetery into a wide cobblestone plaza, where the temple's main facade and prominent red banners come into full view. Finally, the camera ascends a steep stone staircase, moving past the enlarging banners until it comes to a stop before the ornate metalwork of the massive wooden entrance.
